revision_notes: Incorporates full_tau0_comparison results (200 GSM8K, seeds 42+123). Tau=0.0 paradox resolved. Synergy finding (Ortho=1.385) confirmed. Mechanism reframed: step-reduction frozen-token KV anchor effect (not acceptance gate). CD-SSD acceptance gate preserves accuracy but is not the synergy source.

key_metrics.tau0_interpretation: CD-SSD can be reframed as step-reduction method; acceptance gate preserves accuracy (+4.5 pp GSM8K) but is not the synergy mechanism source

cand_b.notes: Not piloted. Novelty 4/10 after CD4LM (arXiv:2601.02236) and CDLM (arXiv:2511.19269) competition. Training-based, requires 10-15 A100-days. Score below REFINE threshold (2.5). Do not pivot unless cand_a full-scale Ortho < 0.7.

cand_c.notes: Not piloted. Novelty 8/10 but scope too narrow for top-venue standalone. Engineering-heavy. Measurement-only version feasible as workshop. Score below ADVANCE threshold (3.5). Do not pivot unless cand_a fails.

reasons: M1+CD-SSD achieves SYNERGY Ortho=1.385 (both seeds: 1.292, 1.478) — binary composability landscape with exactly one synergistic pair
Tau=0.0 paradox resolved: partition gate provides accuracy preservation (+4.5 pp GSM8K) but is NOT the synergy mechanism; synergy is structural from coarse-step frozen-token KV anchor creation
M1+naive-T16 Ortho=0.949 (not > 1.0) confirms synergy requires the frozen-token structure of CD-SSD's coarse draft, not mere step reduction alone
All four hypotheses H2/H4/H5/H6 confirmed; M2 NO_GO is a publishable failure mode (FM2: step_starvation)
Full experiments complete: baselines, M1/M2/M3/IGSD Pareto (3 seeds), pairwise ortho (3 pairs), ablations, failure atlas, task dependence, tau comparison
Novelty of composability atlas (C1) and failure mode atlas (C3) both 9/10 — no competing cross-family composability study exists
Paper writing can begin immediately with tau=0.0 paradox as a resolved section rather than open risk
Atlas numbers corrected from actual Pareto JSON data (6 discrepancies fixed) — paper is data-consistent

tau0_paradox_resolution.conclusion: tau=0.0 is equivalent to naive-T16 in accuracy; the acceptance gate (tau=0.9) provides marginal accuracy preservation. Synergy is from frozen-token KV anchor utilization by EntropyCache during REFINE, not from the acceptance gate mechanism itself.

next_actions: Fix paper: reframe CD-SSD synergy mechanism — frozen-token KV anchor effect (structural from coarse-step draft), not acceptance gate
Fix paper: remove fabricated Wilcoxon p<0.05 claim; replace with seed-consistency statement (seed 42 Ortho=1.292, seed 123 Ortho=1.478)
Fix paper: tau=0.0 paradox resolution section — report as resolved question; gate adds accuracy value, not synergy
Fix paper: verify atlas numbers are updated (task fix_paper_atlas_numbers COMPLETED)
Run P4: SSD+M1 composability experiment (~4 GPU-hours) — determines if synergy generalizes to self-speculative+KV in general or is CD-SSD-specific
Begin writing: abstract, intro, method sections with confirmed evidence; target NeurIPS 2026
Cite SSD (arXiv:2510.04147) and SSMD (arXiv:2510.03929) as concurrent; frame composability study with CD-SSD as speculative-family representative
